tools.name: xerj_search
tools.description: Run a lexical / structured search against a XERJ index using the Elasticsearch-compatible Query DSL (keyword, phrase, boolean, range, term). Backed by POST /{index}/_search on the XERJ REST API (port 9200); the `query` object is sent verbatim as the ES `query` clause.

index.description: Name of the XERJ index (single, comma-separated list, or wildcard like "logs-*").

query.description: An Elasticsearch Query DSL clause, e.g. {"match":{"title":"quarterly report"}}, {"term":{"status":"open"}}, {"range":{"price":{"gte":10}}}, or {"bool":{"must":[...],"filter":[...]}}.

size.description: Maximum number of hits to return. Defaults to 10.

from.description: Offset of the first hit, for pagination. Defaults to 0.

sort.description: Optional ES sort spec, e.g. [{"timestamp":"desc"}]. Omit for relevance order.

source.description: Controls returned `_source` fields: true/false for all, or an array of field names.

aggs.description: Optional ES aggregations object. Not supported together with hybrid-fusion queries.

track_total_hits.description: true for an exact total hit count, false for a fast approximate count, or an integer cap.

tools.name: xerj_semantic_search
tools.description: Search a XERJ index by meaning over a `semantic_text` field. XERJ embeds the query server-side with its built-in embedder (no external key) and ranks by vector similarity. Backed by POST /{index}/_search with body {"query":{"semantic":{"field":...,"query":...,"k":...}}}.

index.description: Name of the XERJ index to search.

field.description: The `semantic_text` field to match. Must be mapped as `semantic_text` so XERJ auto-embedded it at ingest.

query.description: Natural-language query text; embedded server-side and matched by similarity.

k.description: Number of nearest neighbours to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

filter.description: Optional ES query clause pre-filter, e.g. {"term":{"category":"docs"}}. Narrows candidates without scoring.

size.description: Maximum hits to return in the response (independent of k). Defaults to 10.

tools.name: xerj_vector_search
tools.description: Run an EXACT k-nearest-neighbour search over a `dense_vector` field with a caller-supplied embedding. XERJ scores by exact brute-force distance at query time (HNSW is built at ingest; there is no query-time HNSW traversal or ef_search). Backed by POST /{index}/_search using the top-level `knn` clause.

index.description: Name of the XERJ index to search.

field.description: The `dense_vector` field; its dimension must match `query_vector`'s length.

query_vector.description: Query embedding as a flat array of numbers, length equal to the field's mapped dimension.

k.description: Number of nearest neighbours to return. Defaults to 10.

num_candidates.description: Optional candidate-pool size before selecting top k. Scoring is exact, so this mainly bounds the result set.

filter.description: Optional ES query clause used as a kNN pre-filter, e.g. {"term":{"lang":"en"}}.

size.description: Maximum hits to return in the response. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: xerj_hybrid_search
tools.description: Fuse two or more sub-queries (e.g. a lexical BM25 query and a semantic/vector query) into one ranked result set. Backed by POST /{index}/_search with body {"query":{"hybrid":{"queries":[{"query":{...},"weight":...}],"fusion":"rrf"}}}. Fusion is "rrf" (default) or "linear"; "learned" is not implemented and errors. Aggregations cannot be combined with a hybrid query.

index.description: Name of the XERJ index to search.

queries.description: Sub-queries to fuse; each has a `query` (any XERJ/ES clause including `semantic` or `knn`) and an optional `weight`.

query.description: A XERJ/Elasticsearch query clause, e.g. {"match":{"body":"vpn outage"}} or {"semantic":{"field":"body","query":"vpn outage","k":50}}.

weight.description: Relative weight in fusion. Defaults to 1.0.

fusion.description: Fusion strategy: "rrf" (reciprocal rank fusion, default) or "linear" (weighted sum of normalized scores). "learned" is unsupported and returns an error.

rrf_k.description: Rank constant for RRF (only when fusion is "rrf"). Defaults to 60. Maps to fusion {"type":"rrf","k":<rrf_k>}.

size.description: Maximum number of fused hits to return. Defaults to 10.

tools.name: xerj_memory_store
tools.description: Persist a memory into a namespaced XERJ agent-memory store. Backed by POST /_memory/{namespace}; text is stored in a `semantic_text` field and auto-embedded by XERJ's built-in embedder (no external embedding service). Namespaces isolate memories. Optionally supply a precomputed vector, metadata, an explicit id, and opt-in semantic dedup.

namespace.description: Memory namespace (isolation boundary). Starts with a lowercase letter or digit; allowed chars a-z 0-9 _ - . (max 200).

text.description: The memory text. Indexed for BM25 and auto-embedded for semantic recall.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary metadata (tags, source, timestamps). Recall can pre-filter under the `metadata.` prefix.

vector.description: Optional caller-supplied embedding, stored as a `dense_vector` to enable kNN recall.

id.description: Optional explicit ID; a UUID is generated when omitted.

dedup.description: When true, skip the write if the nearest existing memory's similarity meets `dedup_threshold`. Defaults to false.

dedup_threshold.description: Cosine-similarity threshold in [0,1] for dedup. Defaults to 0.95. Ignored unless dedup is true.

tools.name: xerj_memory_recall
tools.description: Recall the most relevant memories from a namespaced XERJ store. Backed by POST /_memory/{namespace}/_recall. Three modes by input: pass `vector` for kNN over your own embedding; set `semantic: true` with `query` for server-side embedded recall (no external key); or pass just `query` for BM25 recall. Returns {"hits":[{"id","text","metadata","score"}],"namespace"}.

namespace.description: Namespace to recall from. Unknown namespace returns an empty hit list.

query.description: Query text for BM25 recall, or the string embedded server-side when `semantic` is true (required in semantic mode).

vector.description: Optional query embedding; runs kNN over stored vectors and takes precedence over query/semantic.

semantic.description: When true, XERJ embeds `query` server-side and recalls by similarity. Requires non-empty `query`. Ignored when `vector` is given. Defaults to false.

k.description: Number of memories to return. Defaults to 10.

filter.description: Optional ES query clause pre-filter over metadata, e.g. {"term":{"metadata.topic":"cats"}}.

recency_weight.description: Optional recency blend in [0,1]. 0 = pure relevance (default when omitted), 1 = pure recency.
